flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Bernard M Baruch College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at CUNY Bernard M Baruch College are 30% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($76.0k vs $58.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CUNY Bernard M Baruch College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (48.6% → 54.9%).
